description: 5-point daily series derived from returns [+2%, -1%, +3%, -2%]. All arithmetic is exact.

conventions.maxDrawdownSign: positive fraction returned by TypeScript (e.g. 0.25 = 25% decline from peak)
conventions.drawdownSeriesSign: negative fraction in sparkline (e.g. -0.02 = 2% below running peak)
conventions.stddevDof: n-1 (sample) in TypeScript; n (population) in Python engine
conventions.sharpeAnnFactor: sqrt(252) for daily data (inferred from avg interval <= 2 days)
conventions.cagrNote: CAGR over 4 calendar days is meaningless for this fixture (huge annualized value). The fixture is designed for Sharpe, Vol, and MaxDD validation only.
